title: Spinach and Slovakian Stir Fry
description: A quick and delicious stir fry with Slovakian sausage and fresh spinach. Serve with a squeeze of citrusy lemon juice.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook until they start to caramelize.
Add the sliced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the Slovakian sausage and cook until browned.
Add the sliced carrots and cook until tender.
Stir in the fresh spinach and cook until wilted.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot with a squeeze of citrusy lemon juice.
